## Improvement checklist

1. **0:00–0:03** — Shock hook visible + audible immediately
2. **Every 1–2s** — Visual change (B-roll cut)
3. **Captions** — ≤4 words, huge, yellow highlight word
4. **End** — Subscribe + Watch Next on screen
5. **Upload** — Custom thumbnail + curiosity title (see SHIP_PACKAGE.json)
